parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player because he contradicted his own role claims. He initially claimed to be a Villager multiple times (at [72] and [80]), but later suddenly claimed to be the Seer (at [93]). His subsequent claim that he saw a Werewolf in the center is likely a bluff to convince the group to vote 'No Werewolf', which would allow him to survive as the Werewolf.
